title_en: For One Night Only is a New Showcase Celebrating UK Video Game Talent, Here’s How To Watch. - IGN
body_en:
The UK has a proud history of creating iconic video game franchises and is home to world-renowned developers ⁠– now, a new major showcase event, For One Night Only, is shining a light on the world-class games made by British studios.
Throughout its approximately 60-80 minute livestream, For One Night Only will feature new trailers, exclusive reveals and on-stage interviews with some of the UK’s biggest and best games industry talent. With a lineup that includes IO Interactive, Team 17 and Criterion (just to name a few), it's easy to see why the UK continues to be a games industry powerhouse.
Join in and celebrate the UK video game industry by watch For One Night Only on Wednesday, 29th July at 7PM BST / 11AM PST via the following platforms:
IGN
YouTube
Facebook
X
Twitch
Steam
Hosted by comedian Bec Hill in front of a VIP industry audience at Outernet in London’s West End, For One Night Only will feature a mix of exclusive reveals, trailers and never-before-seen interviews from both industry titans and indie talent.
A selection of the developers and publishers, and the games they are showcasing include: Annapurna Interactive with The Lost Wild and Silent Hill: Townfall , Bandai Namco with Little Nightmares 3 , IO Interactive with 007 First Ligh t and Yogscast Games with PlateUp! .
For One Night Only will also be supported by a special Steam sale featuring participating British video game studios. The FONO Steam sale starts at 6PM BST on 29th July and runs for one week, so you can make a saving when jumping in to the games featured in the show!
Don’t miss the For One Night Only stream on Wednesday, 29th July at 7PM BST / 11AM PST. In the meantime catch any updates and additional information over on the official For One Night Only social media accounts:
TikTok: @ForOneNightOnlyGames
Insta: @ForOneNightOnlyGames
Twitch: @For_One_Night_Only_Games
Bluesky: @fonogames
YouTube: @ForOneNightOnlyGames
X: @FONO_Games
